result.stdout:
ToonFormat Tool - TOON format converter

Usage:
  toon <command> [options]

Commands:
  encode    Convert JSON to TOON format
  decode    Convert TOON to JSON format

Options:
  -h, --help       Show help
  -v, --version    Show version

Use 'toon <command> --help' for command-specific help

Examples:
  # Convert JSON to TOON
  toon encode input.json
  toon encode input.json -o output.toon

  # Convert TOON to JSON
  toon decode input.toon
  toon decode input.toon -o output.json

  # Read from stdin
  echo '{"key": "value"}' | toon encode
  cat data.toon | toon decode
